description: Templates for understanding, mapping, and improving the end-to-end experience customers have with your product or service — from first awareness through advocacy

templates.name: Customer Journey Map
templates.description: Full end-to-end customer journey with stages, touchpoints, emotions, pain points, and opportunities

templates.name: Empathy Map
templates.description: Classic 4-quadrant empathy map (Says, Thinks, Does, Feels) centered around a specific persona

templates.name: Persona Board
templates.description: Comprehensive user persona including demographics, goals, frustrations, behaviors, and day-in-the-life narrative

templates.name: Touchpoint Analysis
templates.description: Channel-by-stage touchpoint matrix with satisfaction scores and improvement opportunities
